challenges.explanation:
Real: A Reddit comment with personal voice and casual phrasing.
AI: Generated by Claude Sonnet 4 — notice the overly formal tone and lack of personal anecdotes.
hints: Look for personal anecdotes and specific details that are unique to human experiences.
AI-generated text often has a more formal structure and balanced arguments.
Human writing tends to include more emotional nuance and unique perspectives.
challenges.detectionTips: Compare the writing style and look for personal details that would be hard for an AI to invent.

challenges.explanation:
AI-generated images often have telltale signs: unnatural lighting, distorted details in complex areas (hands, text, reflections), inconsistent shadows, or objects that blend together unnaturally.

AI source: thispersondoesnotexist.com
Real source: SOS-Kinderdörfer weltweit
hints: Look closely at the eyes and teeth - AI often struggles with these details.
Check for symmetry in facial features - AI tends to create overly symmetrical faces.
Examine the background for unnatural blending or strange artifacts.
challenges.detectionTips: Focus on small details like hair strands, earrings, and the transition between face and background.

challenges.explanation:
AI-generated videos often have temporal inconsistencies — objects may flicker or morph between frames. Look for: unnatural movements, abrupt lighting changes, shifting facial features, or unstable backgrounds.

AI: Veo3 test non-existent car show by László Gaál
Real: Interview Jean Pierre Kraemer auf der IAA 2019 by IAA MOBILITY
hints: Watch for flickering or morphing between frames in the video.
Pay attention to the consistency of lighting throughout the clip.
Look for unnatural movements or physics that don't quite make sense.
challenges.detectionTips: Focus on temporal consistency - AI often struggles to maintain consistent details across multiple frames.

challenges.explanation:
Real: Mozart Violin Concerto No. 3 — Stuttgart Radio Symphony Orchestra with Hilary Hahn (violin) and Gustavo Dudamel (conductor), birthday concert for Pope Benedict XVI (2007). Watch on YouTube

AI: HOUSE DANCE!! - English ver created by じゃぱんざむらい using Suno v4.5. Listen on Suno
hints: Listen for unnatural transitions between musical phrases.
Pay attention to the consistency of the audio quality throughout the piece.
Notice if the emotional expression feels authentic or mechanical.
challenges.detectionTips: AI-generated audio often has a consistent quality throughout, while human performances have natural variations in dynamics and expression.

challenges.explanation:
AI: Generated with SDXL v2.0 using a Bouguereau painting style LoRA.
Real: Collotype of the painter Albert Bierstadt (1830–1902), made by his brother Edward Bierstadt (1824–1906). This may be the oldest surviving real colour photograph of a human being.

Source: Hanson, D. (2013). Edward Bierstadt: Color photography and color printing.
hints: Look for inconsistencies in the artistic style and brushwork.
Historical photographs have specific characteristics and limitations of their time period.
AI art often has perfect symmetry and idealized features.
challenges.detectionTips: Historical photography techniques had specific limitations and characteristics that AI might not accurately replicate.

challenges.explanation:
AI-generated images often have telltale signs: unnatural lighting, distorted details in complex areas, inconsistent shadows, or objects that blend unnaturally.

AI source: thispersonnotexist.org
Real: Muhammad Ali by Zenon Texeira, 2016
hints: Look for inconsistencies in facial features and proportions.
Check the background for unnatural blurring or strange artifacts.
Examine the lighting and shadows for consistency across the image.
challenges.detectionTips: Famous people are often easier to identify in AI-generated images because we're familiar with how they should look.

challenges.explanation:
AI source: Real Dream Classic SD1.5
Real: Portrait of NASA Engineer Lindsay Aitchison, September 6, 2019 at NASA Headquarters in Washington. Photo Credit: NASA/Aubrey Gemignani
hints: Look for inconsistencies in the background elements and how they interact with the subject.
Professional photography often has specific lighting setups that create distinctive shadows.
Check for unnatural skin textures or hair patterns in portraits.
challenges.detectionTips: Professional photographs typically have consistent lighting and sharp details throughout the image.

challenges.explanation:
Real: Female in Okonjima, Namibia (CC BY-SA 3.0), 9 April 2006 by Wikimedia user ‘Falense’.
AI: LionessXL by Madviking3 — a LoRA trained on 30 images of lionesses with SDXL 1.0 as the base model.
hints: Look for natural imperfections in wildlife photography that AI might miss.
Check the fur texture and patterns for consistency and realism.
Examine the background environment for natural integration with the subject.
challenges.detectionTips: Wildlife photography captures natural behaviors and environments that AI might struggle to accurately represent.

challenges.explanation:
Real: Toss A Coin To Your Witcher by Giona Ostinelli and Sonya Belousova, 2020.
AI: Danse dans une transe (remix v4.5) by LKN. Listen on Suno
hints: Listen for vocal nuances and natural imperfections in human performances.
Pay attention to how lyrics and music blend together in the composition.
Notice if the instrumental backing feels naturally performed or artificially perfect.
challenges.detectionTips: Human vocal performances have subtle variations in timing and pitch that AI often struggles to replicate naturally.
